name: get_statistics
description: Retrieve bandwidth usage, request counts, cache hit ratios, and other traffic statistics for your CDN pull zones.

parameters.name: dateFrom
parameters.description: Start date for the statistics range in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: dateTo
parameters.description: End date for the statistics range in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: pullZone
parameters.description: Filter statistics to a specific pull zone by ID. Omit to get account-wide stats.

parameters.name: hourly
parameters.description: Whether to return hourly breakdowns instead of daily totals.
